fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the service item group.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the service item group.

fields.name: Create Service Item
fields.tooltip: Specifies that when you ship an item associated with this group, the item is registered as a service item in the Service Item table.

fields.name: Default Contract Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount percentage used as the default quote discount in a service contract quote.

fields.name: Default Serv. Price Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service price group code used as the default service price group in the Service Price Group table.

fields.name: Default Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default response time for the service item group.
